_publications._publicationTitle: Nilotinib is more potent than imatinib for treating plexiform neurofibroma in vitro and in vivo.

_contextSnippet: Both nilotinib and imatinib dose-dependently inhibited proliferation and viability of the PNF-derived Schwann cells
details: Both nilotinib and imatinib dose-dependently inhibited proliferation and viability of the PNF-derived Schwann cells
